title: salix rigida var. angustata
intro: Salix rigida var. angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved willow, is a variety of the Salix rigida species, a type of shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of salicylic acid and other compounds. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Salix rigida var. angustata is often used as a tea or tincture, or applied topically as a poultice or salve to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
